title: Garlicky Light Raw-Friendly Egg Noodles Stir-fry
description: A brunch-mood Venezuelan dish featuring light and healthy raw-friendly egg noodles with a touch of garlic for a zesty kick.
instructions: Rinse the egg noodles under cold water and soak them in hot water for about 5 minutes to soften slightly.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add a few drops of extra virgin olive oil, then add the soaked egg noodles. Stir occasionally until they are well-cooked, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Reduce heat to medium and stir in minced garlic, sunflower seeds, parsley, sea salt, and black pepper. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes or until heated through.
Serve hot as a light and refreshing meal for brunch.
